name: kvk-connect (MinBZK)
description_en: Query and track KVK Handelsregister company data — profiles, history, search, and change notifications — from a self-hosted store you run with your own KVK API key.

name: kvk-mcp
description_en: Query the KVK Handelsregister for Dutch company profiles and search, across 10 tools.

name: rdw-mcp
description_en: Query RDW vehicle-registration and open data — keyless, no credentials needed.

name: poc-machine-law
description_en: Query Dutch legislation and check benefits eligibility through the RegelRecht machine-law server.
